metadata.description: Your AI founding team, on your own machine — the Ainvis Local plugin: a board of five executive advisors (COO/CTO/CFO/CMO/CXO) you discuss strategy with, entirely from local Markdown files. Free and open source.

plugins.name: ainvis-local
plugins.description: Your five-executive founding team, on your own machine. Discuss strategy with a board of COO/CTO/CFO/CMO/CXO advisors, entirely from local files.
